title: ammannia wormskioldii
intro: Ammannia wormskioldii, also known as Red Renga Lily or Red Star, is a plant species in the family Lythraceae, native to Africa and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ammannia wormskioldii include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Ammannia wormskioldii are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
